metadata.description: CLI and Claude Code skills for managing GitHub PR review comments

plugins.name: resolve-reviews
plugins.description: Resolve all PR review comments (human and bot) on the current PR

plugins.name: resolve-agent-reviews
plugins.description: Resolve PR review bot findings (Copilot, Cursor Bugbot, etc.) on the current PR

plugins.name: resolve-human-reviews
plugins.description: Resolve human PR review comments on the current PR
